docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,163.97 FILED BY PATRICK & COMPANY, A CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT ROXBURY EXECUTIVES SUITES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 01
